_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: Arrows and insets show abnormal mitotic figures at anaphase and/or metaphase in tumors (c′, d′, c″–e″)
details: Successfully detected proliferating cells in tumor tissue sections, showing abnormal mitotic figures at anaphase and/or metaphase in tumors
